name: A Traditional Side Dish
recipeIngredient: 1 Fresh hot pepper or mildly hot pepper, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, add the cubed tomatoes, sliced red onions, sliced ginger, and sliced hot peppers.
2. Add salt to taste and squeeze lemon juice into the bowl.
3. Cover and let stand in the refrigerator for at least 1/2 hour before serving.
4. This dish pairs well with channa masala and roti or as the main "chutney" with aloo parathas.
